## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment details
- SDK Version: [e.g. 1.2.9]

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior or a minimal code snippet:
1. Initialize BentoGuard with '...'
2. Call `bento.protect()`
3. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Error Logs
If applicable, paste any error logs or stack traces here.
